items.title: Britain plots Visa rival over fears Trump could pull the plug on payments
items.description: Britain is accelerating plans to launch an alternative to Mastercard and Visa amid growing fears Donald Trump could pull the plug on the global payments system.

items.title: Euronet Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates on Increasing Expenses
items.description: EEFT's Q4 EPS misses estimates as expenses climb and U.S. reforms hit transfers, even as revenues rise and full-year profit grows.

items.title: 10 Financials Stocks Whale Activity In Today's Session
This Week In Digital Payment - Fiserv's Strategic Growth Amidst Digital Payments Evolution
items.description: Recent developments in the digital payment sector highlight the evolving landscape of financial services technology. Fiserv, a leader in payments and financial technology solutions, has reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, showcasing modest revenue growth amid mixed performance across different segments. The company achieved a 4% increase in GAAP revenue for the year, driven by growth in its Merchant Solutions. Despite challenges, Fiserv continues to...

items.title: Visa Expands Small Business Support And Cross Border Reach With New Deals
items.description: Visa (NYSE:V) has launched "Visa & Main," a new platform aimed at supporting U.S. small businesses. The company is working with Lendistry on a US$100 million working capital facility for eligible entrepreneurs. Visa has entered a milestone partnership with UnionPay International to extend Visa Direct reach into Chinese Mainland. Visa, a global payments network, is moving beyond card transactions into tools that support small business operations and access to funding. The "Visa & Main"...
